channel.title: WorldAML Insights
channel.description: Practical AML, KYC/KYB, sanctions and regulatory compliance analysis from the WorldAML team.

item.title: PEP Screening Guide: Who Are PEPs and How to Screen Them Effectively
item.description: Everything compliance teams need to know about Politically Exposed Persons (PEPs) — definitions, risk categories, screening requirements, and how to manage PEP relationships under EU, UK, and FATF standards.
item.author: info@worldaml.com (WorldAML Compliance Team)
item.dc:creator: WorldAML Compliance Team
